title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Jabalpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd:
SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
